subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Lord! Thou seest me abased before the gate of Thy oneness, clinging to the hem of the robe of Thy singleness, and calling upon Thee to [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی ترانی متذللا بباب احدیتک متشبثا بذیل رداء فردانیتک و ادعوک ان
subcodes.subjects: @angels, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for spiritual recognition
